title: Plans for Australia's first Trump Tower scrapped due to 'toxic' brand, developer says
snippet: The 91-storey luxury hotel on the Gold Coast in Queensland was meant to be Australia's tallest building.

title: Elon Musk said control of OpenAI should go to his children, Sam Altman tells jury
snippet: Sam Altman said Elon Musk tried many times for total control of OpenAI, which he's now suing.

title: Massive Alaska megatsunami was second largest ever recorded
snippet: New research suggests glacier melt driven by climate change is increasing the risk of giant waves.

title: Not so dusty: How tech is changing woodworking
snippet: Woodworking shops have been transformed by tech to make tools safer and more precise.

title: Air India crisis deepens ahead of final Ahmedabad crash report
snippet: Air India faces a leadership vacuum and mounting financial losses as it struggles to recover from the crash.

title: US inflation jumps to 3.8% as energy costs surge from Iran war
snippet: The key measure of US inflation rises its highest level since May 2023 as consumers feel the impact of the Iran war.

title: Trump's 'Golden Dome' will cost $1.2tn and might not stop all-out missile attack
snippet: That pricetag is nearly seven times higher than Trump's initial estimate, found an independent budget office.

title: £20m mystery gift buys London Zoo new hospital where you can watch vets work
snippet: Visitors will be able to watch live veterinary procedures inside a state-of-the-art new animal hospital.

title: A decade on, Trump returns to a stronger and more assertive China
snippet: Beijing is arguably the most powerful competitor the US has confronted in its history, one analyst says.

title: TikTok launches £3.99 subscription for no ads in UK
snippet: Those who don't subscribe will be able to use the platform for free - but be shown personalised ads by default.

title: French national shows symptoms on return from hantavirus-hit ship
snippet: Five passengers of the MV Hondius will be quarantined in Paris "until further notice", France's prime minister says.

title: Texas accuses Netflix of spying on users, including children
snippet: The lawsuit comes amid increased scrutiny over platform features like auto-play that deliver endless content to users.

title: Daily pill to help keep weight off after stopping obesity jabs
snippet: The tablet - orforglipron - is available in the US and could soon launch in the UK.

title: No sign of larger hantavirus outbreak, says UN health agency
snippet: The situation could still change and there might be more confirmed cases, warns the head of the World Health Organization.

title: UK borrowing costs jump as uncertainty over PM's future continues
snippet: The possibility of a change of leadership in the UK has unsettled some investors and sent bond yields higher.
